mechanics.excerpt: This information should help you choose the right affiliation for your character: The Game Material section for each affiliation includes any extras character from that affiliation might receive_ like bonus Skill Points_ traits and other information such as restrictions on what paths they can follow. Keep in mind that player characters get the listed bonus skills traits and s0 on because they are exceptional individuals; These do not necessarily apply t0 every man, woman and child in each affiliation.
